## KEY FRAMEWORKS EXTRAÍDOS

1. Three Key Principles to Market Domination (Pond → Fish → Net)
2. Market Position Ladder (Generalist → Celebrity)
3. 96-4 Rule (20% of 20%)
4. Marketing Triangle (Pulse, Behavior, Avatar)
5. Golden Circles applied (WHY → HOW → WHAT)
6. Pink Sheet Framework (Point → Stuff → Big Picture)
7. 4-Question Naming Strategy
8. Two Golden Rules of New Era Marketing
9. SAGE Principle (Short, Actionable, Goal, Easy)
10. Triangle of Trust (Educate, Engage, Inspire)
11. SNAP/CRAP/GAP/TRAP Matrix
12. Magnet Framework (Intro → Content → CTA)
13. Anatomy of Perfect Ad (8 elements)
14. Anatomy of Perfect Landing Page
15. 5 Key Principles to Tuning the Mechanism
16. 5 Indoctrination Piece Options
17. Enrollment Call Script Template
18. Strategy Session Application Form
19. Campaign Diagnosis Framework
20. Credential Statement Formula

## NOTA
